creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 196782
py-django-mptt-0.9.1.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-mptt to 0.9.1 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/django-mptt/django-mptt/compare/0.9.0...0.9.1

Changes to the port:
- switched from GH to CHEESESHOP


QA:
- poudriere (10.4, 11.1, 11.2-RELEASE, 12.0-ALPHA4 i386 + amd64) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
